info.title: CodeLand.io Backend API
info.description: API for user management, authentication, exercises, and scoring system

post.description: Create a new user account with username, email, and password

400.description: Invalid payload or user already exists

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password

get.description: Get HTML page for user management (returns HTML template)

post.description: Create a new user using HTML form data (used by management page)

200.description: User created and management page returned

get.description: Health check for users service including database connection test

200.description: Service is healthy and database is connected

get.description: Retrieve a list of all users with their latest profile image presigned URLs

post.description: Create a new user (requires admin privileges)

400.description: Invalid payload or user already exists

get.description: Get admin create user page (requires admin privileges)

post.summary: Create user with admin privileges (Admin only)
post.description: Create a new user with specified admin and active status (requires admin privileges)

400.description: Invalid payload or user already exists

get.description: Retrieve a specific user by their ID with their latest profile image presigned URL
Retrieve a list of all exercises

post.description: Create a new exercise (requires admin privileges)

example.title: Sum Function
example.body: Define a function called sum that takes two integers as arguments and returns their sum.

get.description: Retrieve a specific exercise by its ID

put.description: Update an existing exercise (requires admin privileges)

post.description: Validate user's code against an exercise's test cases

answer.example:
def sum(a, b):
    return a + b

get.description: Retrieve a list of all scores

post.description: Create a new score for an exercise

example.answer:

    return a + b

Retrieve a specific score for the authenticated user

put.description: Update a score for a specific exercise

400.description: Invalid payload or score does not exist

post.description: Upload a profile image for a user (requires authentication)

profile_image.description: Profile image file (max 5MB, supported formats: png, jpg, jpeg, gif)

profile_image_url.description: Presigned URL for uploaded profile image

get.description: Get presigned URL for user's latest profile image from S3 (requires authentication)

profile_image_url.description: Presigned URL for the latest profile image

404.description: User not found or no profile image

BearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from login or registration

profile_image_url.description: Presigned URL for profile image (null if no image exists)

body.example: Define a function called sum that takes two integers as arguments and returns their sum.
